tasks.method: Grouped bar chart with X-axis: academic divisions (AS/EN), Y-axis: minor count totals. Color encodes division. Click interaction triggers drill-down to department-level horizontal bar chart showing DName vs minor counts.
tasks.objective: Reveal concentration patterns of minor choices at division and department levels

tasks.method: Matrix heatmap with X-axis: advisors' primary department divisions (from Member_of), Y-axis: student minor divisions. Aggregation shows count of student-advisor pairs per division combination. Tooltip shows exact counts.
tasks.objective: Identify mentorship patterns between advisor affiliations and student minor choices

tasks.method: Pie chart overlay: Inner ring shows major distribution across divisions (AS/EN), outer ring breaks into sub-sections by Department.DName. Interactive legend allows division filtering.
tasks.objective: Provide hierarchical view of major concentration patterns

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot with axes: MajorDivision, MinorDivision, Age. Brushing highlights student clusters. Color encodes sex (M/F) for secondary pattern discovery.
tasks.objective: Detect student subgroups with similar academic portfolio configurations

tasks.method: Scatter plot with X: major division, Y: minor division. Points colored by frequency. Highlight outliers where students minor outside their major division (e.g., AS majors with EN minors).
tasks.objective: Identify atypical academic combinations for further investigation
